title: Partition schemas + template skeleton
description: Evolve issue.schema.json and sprint.schema.json to the partitioned shape (PRD-004), and make the template stamp .excn/issues/backlog.json plus a sprint-N skeleton instead of the single issues.json/sprint records. Src-First: schemas and template change in src/ first, root mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: issue.schema.json and sprint.schema.json are updated to the partitioned shape
the template stamps .excn/issues/backlog.json and a sprint-N skeleton
schemas parse and a freshly stamped Instance validates against them
root schemas/ and template mirror src (Src-First)
notes: New for sprint 2 under PRD-004 (work-tracking partition). This slice introduces the partitioned shape; EXEC-009 (execution-to-issues) depends on it. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_2 item S2-6): issue/sprint schemas carry the partition contract (backlog.json + sprint-<N>/sprint-<N>-issues.json), template stamps empty backlog.json, .gitkeep removed, src+root mirrored; package-qa PASS 0 violations.
